Since max_bead_count=3 is NOT <= 2, effective_optimal_width resolves to optimal_width=4000 regardless of preferred_bead_width_outer's value, and RedistributeBeadingStrategy's optimal_width_outer parameter -- now sourced from preferred_bead_width_outer instead of optimal_width -- is numerically identical (4000) either way, so all expected_raw/expected_stripped values below are UNCHANGED and were NOT recomputed.
